---
title: "Numerical Methods for Differential Equations"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 2"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Numerical Methods for Differential Equations

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 2

Rigorous numerical methods for solving the differential equations that arise in every domain of this curriculum. Covers finite difference, finite element, and spectral methods with convergence theory.

## Table of Contents

1. Finite Difference Methods for Elliptic Problems
2. Finite Difference Methods for Parabolic Problems
3. Finite Difference Methods for Hyperbolic Problems
4. Finite Element Methods: Theory
5. Finite Element Methods: Advanced Topics
6. Spectral Methods
7. Finite Volume Methods
8. Structure-Preserving and Geometric Integrators

---

## Chapter 1: Finite Difference Methods for Elliptic Problems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Finite Difference Methods for Parabolic Problems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Finite Difference Methods for Hyperbolic Problems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Finite Element Methods: Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Finite Element Methods: Advanced Topics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Spectral Methods

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Finite Volume Methods

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Structure-Preserving and Geometric Integrators

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
